news.t: Why Goldman Sachs is helping its clients launch ETFs
Hedge funds, family offices among those turning to Goldman Sachs ETF Accelerator

holdings.infoBox: BSMC is an equity ETF with a total of 75 individual holdings. The top holdings are Innovex International stock at 2.98%, Ingles Markets at 2.82%, International Flavors & Fragrances at 2.69%, Elanco Animal Health at 2.63%, and Amdocs at 2.43%.

overview.description: The Brandes U.S. Small-Mid Cap Value ETF (BSMC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in equity securities of small- and mid-cap companies in the US. The fund seeks securities that are perceived to be undervalued BSMC was launched on Oct 3, 2023 and is issued by Brandes.

data.title: Why Goldman Sachs is helping its clients launch ETFs
data.text: Firms should offer ETF products because investor demand is not slowing down, according to one Goldman Sachs ETF expert.

data.title: Redefining "active" investing
data.text: Redefining "active" investing... and how it comes to market.

data.title: Hedge funds, family offices among those turning to Goldman Sachs ETF Accelerator
data.text: Goldman Sachs Group's recently created business designed to help firms quickly launch exchange-traded funds has more than just traditional asset managers as clients.
